replenishment_policy.instruction: Yangi vazifalarni faqat ro'yxat minimum_todo_tasks darajasidan pastga tushganda qo'shing. Avval bajarilgan yoki bloklangan vazifalarni tekshiring. Yangi vazifalar qo'shishda asosan barqarorlik, testlarni oshirish va xatolarni to'g'irlashga e'tibor qarating.

autonomous_loop_policy.selection_rule: High yoki critical risk bilan bloklanmagan birinchi 'todo' statusdagi vazifani tanlang.
autonomous_loop_policy.anti_stall_rule: Agar arxitektura va test natijalaridan yangi past riskli vazifalar yaratish imkoni bo'lsa, foydalanuvchini chalg'itib savol bermang.
autonomous_loop_policy.max_pr_scope: PR uchun faqat bitta task id
autonomous_loop_policy.failure_rule: Agar CI/testlar muvaffaqiyatsiz bo'lsa, yangi imkoniyatlar qo'shishdan oldin xatolikni tuzatish vazifasiga ustuvorlik bering.

tasks.title: Validate agent task manifest format
tasks.description: agent_tasks.json faylining to'g'riligini va uning tuzilishini tekshiradigan validator yozish.
acceptance: agar xatolik bo'lsa, skript aniq xato xabarini qaytaradi

tasks.title: Resolve basic flake8 errors
tasks.description: Loyiha ildizidagi flake8_report.txt hisobotiga asoslanib asosiy sintaktik va formatlash xatolarini to'g'irlash.

tasks.title: Fix mypy redefinition errors in utils
tasks.description: Fix mypy 'no-redef' errors in uzsl_bot/utils/sync_to_huggingface.py and uzsl_bot/utils/export.py by adding ignore comments to fallback imports.
acceptance: mypy uzsl_bot/ tests/ runs successfully without 'no-redef' errors

tasks.title: Add pytest-asyncio to test requirements
tasks.description: Add pytest-asyncio to requirements to fix async test execution warnings.
acceptance: pytest runs asynchronously without 'async def functions are not natively supported' errors

tasks.title: Fix mypy module resolution error for gcn.py
tasks.description: Fix the mypy error 'Source file found twice under different module names: gcn and models.gcn' in ml_training/models/gcn.py by adding explicit-package-bases to mypy.ini or adjusting imports. Alternatively, update the CI workflow to set MYPYPATH and adjust imports if needed to ensure absolute imports.
acceptance: mypy runs without module resolution error for gcn.py

tasks.title: Add type hints to GCN module
tasks.description: Add proper return type and argument type hints to the methods in GraphConvolution class (like __init__ and reset_parameters) in ml_training/models/gcn.py.

tasks.title: Fix pytest import errors for telegram bot tests
tasks.description: Fix the pytest 'ModuleNotFoundError' when collecting tests by adding the necessary mock modules or installing the missing requirements in the CI workflow.
acceptance: pytest --ignore=magda_agent collects and runs successfully without import errors
